Lac-c..Bladder: Constant urging to urinate. Irritable bladder.
Lac-c..Chest: Much trouble with the mammae; they feel as if they would suppurate.
Lac-c..Extremities: Rheumatism with swelling of the lower extremities, especially when it affects the limbs alternately; aggravated by motion and heat, ameliorated by cold. Pains in the limbs as if beaten. Rheumatic swellings of joints.
Lac-c..Generalities: This remedy abounds in nervous symptoms, although it has no doubt tissue changes as well. It is deep and long acting; the provers felt its symptoms for years after the proving was made.
Lac-c..Genitalia female: The female sexual organs furnish a mass of symptoms. Severe pain in the region of the right ovary, ameliorated by the flow of bright red blood, is again somewhat like Lach. These pains take alternate sides.
Lac-c..Genitalia female, pain: Severe pain in the region of the right ovary, ameliorated by the flow of bright red blood, is again somewhat like Lach. These pains take alternate sides.
Lac-c..Head: The headaches are violent and are mostly frontal, but it has also, occipital headaches.
Lac-c..Mind: Full of imaginations and harassing, tormenting thoughts. Wandering features in the mental sphere, wandering and alternating states. Cannot collect the thoughts.
Lac-c..Mouth: The mucous membrane and teeth are coated with a fuzzy, shining, silvery substance, somewhat like milk.
Lac-c..Stomach: The abdomen is full of distress. Pressive pain in the pelvis; acute pain in left groin.
Lac-c..Vertigo: A peculiar vertigo, a condition, when walking, in which she seems to be floating in mid-air, or, when lying, as it she were not on the bed.
Lac-c..Bladder, urination: The fermentation of mucus and other substances in the bladder causing the escape of gas when urinating is found only under Sars.; the urine flows with a loud noise.
Lac-c..Generalities, pain: An oversensitive state prevails, a general hyperesthesia of the skin and all parts.
Lac-c..Clinical, paralysis: It is an important remedy in complaints following badly treated diphtheria, in paralysis and other conditions dating back to diphtheria.
Lac-c..Generalities, side: The complaints, almost regardless of kind or quality, change sides. The rheumatism is first found in one ankle and then in the other, and then back again to the original site.
Lac-c..Clinical: It is an important remedy in complaints following badly treated diphtheria, in paralysis and other conditions dating back to diphtheria. The greater number of its symptoms belong to the nervous system.
Lac-c..Genitalia female, uterus: Membranous dysmenorrhoea is another example of the exsudative tendency of Lac c. Sore throat beginning and ending with the menstrual period.
Lac-c..Chest, pain: Much trouble with the mammae; they feel as if they would suppurate.
Lac-c..Ear: The pain in the throat pushes toward the left ear.
Lac-c..Face: Faceache; pain aggravated by exertion, ameliorated by warm applications, but only cold applications relieve the soreness.
Lac-c..Head, pain: Headache above the eyes from riding in the cold wind, ameliorated in a warm room. Both the frontal and occipital headaches are aggravated by turning the eyeballs upwards and using the eyes for fine work. Pains in the head during the day, first on one side then on the other, either side being first affected.
Lac-c..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Chronic sadness, everything so dark; irritable, ugly, hateful.
Lac-c..Throat: In the throat there is a felt-like exudation, ashy gray or silvery shiny deposit. The pain in the throat pushes toward the left ear. Pains take alternate sides. The throat is ameliorated by cold or warm drinks, and aggravated by empty swallowing.
